name: Ser Educacional S.A.
summary: Ser Educacional S.A. primarily engages in the development and management of on-campus and distance-learning undergraduate, graduate, professional training, and other areas of education in Brazil. It manages two universities, eleven university centers, 41 colleges, and 336 operational distance-learning centers. The company operates under the UNINASSAU, UNINABUCO, UNG, UNAMA, UNIVERITAS, UNINABUCO, Faculdades UNINASSAU, Faculdades UNINABUCO, and Escolas T√É¬©cnicas Joaquim Nabuco and Maur√É¬≠cio de Nassau brands. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Recife, Brazil.
